who: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR
offer: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire integration. We provide a structured onboarding checklist instead of manual checklists and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire integration.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR coordinators seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about onboarding challenges
Direct message 20-50 HR coordinators with a demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tool discussions
try_it: Let users try step-by-step onboarding guide and checklist tracking for completion on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
